summary: Fleet Planning - Unassigned Bookings & Assignment Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 10/10 API tests passed (GET /api/fleet/planning returns unassigned array, PUT /api/fleet/my-bookings/{id}/assign, POST /api/fleet/planning/check-conflict). Frontend: All UI flows working - Unassigned panel displays missions with type/date/time/price/addresses/pax, Affecter button shows driver dropdown, assignment moves booking from unassigned panel to driver timeline, success toast shown.

issues: React hydration warnings in console from Emergent preview wrapper injecting <span> into <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, does NOT affect functionality

backend_tests.test_planning_returns_unassigned_array: PASS - Response includes 'unassigned' array with 3 bookings
backend_tests.test_unassigned_booking_structure: PASS - Has id, type, date, time, price, pickupAddress, dropoffAddress, passengers
backend_tests.test_unassigned_has_start_end_time: PASS - Has startTime and endTime for conflict checks
backend_tests.test_assign_driver_invalid_booking: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid booking ID
backend_tests.test_assigned_booking_moves_from_unassig: PASS - Booking removed from unassigned, appears in driver events
backend_tests.test_unassign_driver_invalid_booking: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid booking ID

frontend_tests.unassigned_panel_header: PASS - Shows 'Missions non affectees (3)' with warning icon
frontend_tests.unassigned_booking_details: PASS - Each shows type (Transfer), date/time, pickup/dropoff, price, pax
frontend_tests.booking_moves_to_timeline: PASS - Booking appears as blue SOCIETE block on driver row
frontend_tests.booking_removed_from_unassigned: PASS - Count decreases from 3 to 2 to 1

verified_features: Backend GET /api/fleet/planning returns 'unassigned' array with bookings without driver
Backend PUT /api/fleet/my-bookings/{id}/assign assigns driver to booking
Frontend: Unassigned panel at top of Planning page with amber dashed border
Frontend: Panel header shows 'Missions non affectees (N)' with warning icon
Frontend: Each unassigned booking shows type icon, Transfer label, date/time
Frontend: Each booking shows pickup address (blue pin), dropoff address (red pin)
Frontend: Each booking shows price in EUR and passenger count (pax)
Frontend: Each booking has green 'Affecter' button with UserPlus icon
Frontend: Clicking 'Affecter' shows inline form with driver dropdown
Frontend: Dropdown shows activated drivers only (Vova YERITSYAN, Mariam saroyan)
Frontend: Form has OK (confirm) and X (cancel) buttons
Frontend: After assignment, toast shows 'Mission affectee a [driver name]'
Frontend: Booking disappears from unassigned panel after assignment
Frontend: Booking appears as blue SOCIETE block on driver's timeline row
critical_code_review_comments: FleetPlanning.js correctly implements unassigned panel with proper data-testid attributes
Assignment flow correctly calls PUT /api/fleet/my-bookings/{id}/assign with driverId and driverName
Backend fleet_planning.py correctly filters unassigned bookings (driver=null, status not cancelled/completed)
Conflict check is called before assignment to validate driver availability
After successful assignment, fetchPlanning() is called to refresh the view
All interactive elements have proper data-testid for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unassigned bookings feature fully tested. Test data reset to 3 unassigned bookings. Use date 2026-03-19 for testing. Mariam saroyan has existing booking at 14:00-15:30 for conflict testing. Assignment flow: click Affecter -> select driver -> click OK -> booking moves from unassigned panel to driver timeline.

mocked_api.note: Uses live C# backend (Zont API) + MongoDB. No mocking.
